summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Sentinel-01 ERC-8004 capital protection agent. All backend APIs and frontend dashboard functionality working correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/ - root endpoint returns Sentinel-01 info
GET /api/agent/status - returns agent status with policy_hash, portfolio, metrics
POST /api/agent/cycle?asset=ETH - runs single cycle and returns ValidationArtifact
GET /api/market/price/ETH - returns real price from CoinGecko
Dashboard Overview tab shows portfolio value, drawdown, cycles, success rate
Dashboard Market tab shows ETH and BTC prices from CoinGecko
Dashboard Risk tab shows risk limits and reputation metrics
Dashboard Governance tab shows governance status
Run Cycle button works and updates artifacts
